ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Filets de maquereaux* (Scomber scombrus) 60 %, eau, aromates 10 % (carottes, poivrons rouges, cornichons au vinaigre (cornichons, eau, sel, vinaigre d’alcool, affermissant : chlorure de calcium), oignons, persil), vinaigre d'alcool, vinaigre de vin blanc, vin blanc 1,8 %, sel, arômes, *_poissons_
